summary: Iteration 94 - Document Intelligence endpoints and frontend components testing completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed for all 5 endpoints (POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id}, GET /api/document-intelligence/{id}, GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue, PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id}, GET /api/document-intelligence/summary). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Document Review Queue page at /document-review with summary cards, filter dropdowns, review queue table, and By Document Type section. Document Intelligence Panel on document detail page with readiness banner, classification section, extracted fields list, edit/re-process buttons, correction history toggle.

issues: Minor console warning about <tr>/<span> hydration - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/summary returns 200 with total_processed, by_readiness, by_document_type, total_corrections
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue returns 200 with total, items, status_counts, limit, offset
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue?status=ready filters by ready status
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue?status=needs_review filters by needs_review status
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue?status=blocked filters by blocked status
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue items enriched with file_name, doc_status, email_sender
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/{id} returns 200 with document_type, classification_confidence, automation_readiness, score
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/{id} returns 404 for unprocessed document
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id} returns 404 for non-existent doc_id

Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id} returns result with all required fields (result_id, document_type, classification_confidence, extracted_fields, automation_readiness, automation_readiness_score, automation_readiness_reasons, model_name, prompt_version, processing_duration_ms)
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id} can re-process same document multiple times
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id} returns 404 for unprocessed document
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id} applies type correction and sets classification_confidence to 1.0
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id} applies field corrections and adds to correction_history
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id} re-derives automation_readiness after correction
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id} records corrected_by, notes, changes in correction_history
Backend: Integration flow: process -> get -> correct works end-to-end
Backend: Full data assertions on response structure and field values
Frontend: Document Review Queue page loads at /document-review
Frontend: Summary cards show Total Processed (7), Ready (6), Needs Review (0), Blocked (1)
Frontend: Status filter dropdown (data-testid='filter-status') works
Frontend: Doc type filter dropdown (data-testid='filter-doc-type') present
Frontend: Sort toggle button (data-testid='toggle-sort') present
Frontend: Refresh button (data-testid='refresh-queue-btn') present
Frontend: Review queue table (data-testid='review-queue-table') with columns: Status, Document, Type, Confidence, Score, Reasons, Actions
Frontend: By Document Type section shows AP_Invoice (5, 99%), Shipping_Document (1, 95%), Freight_Document (1, 95%)
Frontend: Document Intelligence Panel (data-testid='document-intelligence-panel') renders on document detail page
Frontend: Readiness banner shows status (BLOCKED/READY/NEEDS_REVIEW), score, reasons, and 'Corrected' badge if manually corrected
Frontend: Classification section shows Type and Confidence with progress bar
Frontend: Model info displays (gemini-3-flash-preview v1.0 processing_duration_ms)
Frontend: Extracted Fields section lists all fields with required (*) markers and missing indicators
Frontend: Edit button (data-testid='edit-intelligence-btn') enables inline editing
Frontend: Edit mode shows type input (data-testid='edit-doc-type-input') and field inputs (data-testid='edit-field-{name}')
Frontend: Save Corrections (data-testid='save-corrections-btn') and Cancel (data-testid='cancel-edit-btn') buttons in edit mode
Frontend: Re-process button (data-testid='process-intelligence-btn') triggers pipeline
Frontend: Correction History toggle (data-testid='toggle-correction-history') shows N corrections, expands to show history entries
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Router at /app/backend/routers/document_intelligence.py - clean REST API design with proper error handling (404 for not found, 500 for processing errors)
Backend: Service at /app/backend/services/document_intelligence_service.py - comprehensive pipeline orchestration with AI classification, validation, automation readiness derivation
Backend: _derive_automation_readiness function (lines 61-154) properly computes score based on confidence, extraction completeness, validation results
Backend: apply_correction (lines 420-542) properly re-derives readiness after corrections and maintains correction_history
Frontend: DocumentReviewQueuePage.js - good use of data-testid attributes, proper filter state management, good UX with loading states
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js - well-structured component with edit mode, correction history, proper loading/error states
Minor: Console hydration warning about <tr>/<span> nesting in DocumentReviewQueuePage - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_created.intelligence_results: 7 documents processed with intelligence results in document_intelligence_results collection
seed_data_created.test_corrections: Multiple TEST_* corrections applied during testing (test_field: TEST_VALUE_12345, type corrections by test_agent)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 94 - Document Intelligence feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id} (runs full pipeline), GET /api/document-intelligence/{id} (get result), GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue (items needing review with filters), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/{id} (corrections), GET /api/document-intelligence/summary (stats). Results stored in 'document_intelligence_results' MongoDB collection. Frontend: /document-review route shows review queue page with summary cards, filters, table. DocumentIntelligencePanel component on document detail page shows readiness banner, classification, extracted fields, edit mode, correction history. Key data-testids: document-review-queue-page, summary-total/ready/needs-review/blocked, filter-status, filter-doc-type, review-queue-table, document-intelligence-panel, readiness-banner, process-intelligence-btn, edit-intelligence-btn, save-corrections-btn, cancel-edit-btn, toggle-correction-history. Automation readiness levels: ready (score >= 75), needs_review (40-74), blocked (< 40 or missing required fields).

returns.items: list (enriched with file_name, doc_status, email_sender, etc.)
returns.status_counts: dict {ready: N, needs_review: N, blocked: N}

behavior: If corrected_type provided, sets classification_confidence to 1.0
Adds entry to correction_history with corrected_at, corrected_by, notes, changes

features: Extracted Fields list with required markers

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API (BC sandbox) operates in DEMO MODE. Email service is MOCKED (in-memory).
